channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Fatal crash shut down southbound I-75 near SR-56 in Pasco County: FHP
item.description: A fatal crash shut down southbound Interstate 75 in Pasco County late Sunday, forcing drivers off the highway near State Road 56.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Bradenton police break up large teen gathering along Riverwalk
item.description: Hundreds of teens gathered along the Bradenton Riverwalk Saturday night before police shut down parts of the area and dispersed the crowd to prevent safety issues and business disruptions.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Fantasy 5, Cash Pop results for July 12, 2026
[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 12
item.description: Witness describes plane making emergency water landing, deputies investigate shooting in Beacon Square neighborhood and hot week ahead.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Pasco deputies investigate shooting in Beacon Square neighborhood: PSO
item.description: Multiple gunshots reported in a Beacon Square neighborhood led deputies to detain several people after investigators said weapons were fired in a backyard.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Live-action 'Moana' crashes to shore with underwhelming splash at the box office
item.description: The Walt Disney Company’s live action “Moana” may be the No. 1 movie at the domestic box office, but it did not make a big splash in its first weekend in theaters.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Sen. McConnell says fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed for the first time that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.
